cleavage agent: Proteins were digested with trypsin at a 1:20 enzyme-to-substrate ratio
collision energy: Fragmentation was achieved via HCD with 36% normalized collision energy
instrument: introduced into an Orbitrap Fusion™ Lumos™ Tribrid™ mass spectrometer
labeling: 0.8 mg of TMT reagent was dissolved in 45 μL of anhydrous acetonitrile
reduction reagent: 50 mM HEPES containing 5 mM TCEP and 20 mM CAA
reduction concentration: 50 mM HEPES containing 5 mM TCEP and 20 mM CAA
